productDisplayName: Nike Men's Tennis White Green Shoe
description: If you want the ultimate sensation of comfort for your feet, then these nike capri shoes are perfect for you. Designed for the tennis-lover, these shoes are a great combination of comfort and style. Featuring lovely stitch and overlay details on a base colour, the nike capri sneakers are a great add-on to the wardrobe. Team these with jeans and tees for a cool casual look.Upper Breathable canvas upper for Fit and flexibility Central hand-knitted lacing for snug fit Lining under the tongue for comfort fit Midsole Autoclave construction midsole for enhanced cushioning EVA injected midsole for lightweight feel Outsole Solid rubber outsole in herringbone pattern for superior grip Pivot point below the big toe mound for superior traction Staright line grooves below toes and heel for traction and stability Wash careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
